title: Fix CodeDeploy after_install failure after Poetry migration

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Investigating CodeDeploy after_install failure on staging after Poetry migration; auditing deployment script assumptions and patching for robust Poetry-based installs.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Confirmed AWS CodeDeploy failure root cause via aws deploy get-deployment-instance: after_install used poetry install --sync in same conda env, which removed Poetry packages mid-run. Updated after_install.sh to bootstrap Poetry via python -m pip/python -m poetry and switched install to --only main without --sync to prevent self-removal. Pushed commit e9a1a885 on feature/poetry-conversion.
